instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Fatima Wilson and your email is fatima.wilson5721@example.com. You are polite, flexible, creative. You want to return everything you just bought except the coffee machine.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: return everything you just bought except the coffee machine
dialogue_state.initial_query: return all recent purchases except the coffee machine

hints.hint: Please be polite in all communications
I can be flexible with return options
I'm open to creative solutions if needed
